text.title: strategy-analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for strategy-analysis as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Solution-shaped business need: "we need a CRM" presented as the business need.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The framer must reject anything not outcome-shaped; require the stakeholder to state the problem the CRM solves before accepting the request.

failure-mode.description: Goal hallucination — future-state agent invents measurable-looking goals ("reduce cost 30%") with no source quote.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require source_quote + source_doc per goal; reject any goal without a cited evidence span from an elicitation artifact.

failure-mode.description: Risk register monoculture — only "change risks" listed, no "do-nothing risks".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Encode both registers as required in the JSON schema; a validator rejects any risk output with only one register.

failure-mode.description: Vendor-biased options — when the change-strategy-agent has access to vendor docs, options drift toward those vendors.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force brainstorm divergence first; options must include build and status-quo before any vendor option is considered.

failure-mode.description: Stale current-state artifact used without freshness check.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An agent should check last_validated_at and refuse to proceed if the artifact is older than 90 days; stale context produces gap analysis against a changed baseline.

failure-mode.description: Trace decay: requirements created after KA-6 have no traces_to the originating goal.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-commit hook rejects orphan requirements; every requirement must carry a traces_to: GOAL-XX frontmatter entry.
